name: WebSocket Chat Broadcast
title: FastAPI WebSocket Chat Server
description: Create a WebSocket chat server in FastAPI. Allow multiple clients to connect, send messages, and broadcast those messages to all other connected clients in real time. Handle disconnection gracefully.

name: WebSocket Rooms
title: WebSocket Chat with Named Rooms
description: Extend a WebSocket chat server to support named rooms. Clients should be able to join a specific room, and messages should only be broadcast to clients in the same room.

name: WebSocket Auth JWT
title: Authenticated WebSocket Connection
description: Implement JWT-based authentication for a WebSocket endpoint in FastAPI. Validate the token passed in the connection query string or header before accepting the WebSocket handshake.

name: WebSocket Pub Sub Redis
title: Redis PubSub WebSocket Server
description: Build a WebSocket server that uses Redis Pub/Sub to allow multiple server instances to broadcast messages to all clients across servers. Implement a channel subscription pattern.

name: WebSocket Heartbeat
title: WebSocket Heartbeat and Keep-Alive
description: Implement a heartbeat mechanism for a WebSocket server. Send periodic ping frames to detect stale connections and close them after a configurable timeout. Track connection health metrics.

name: WebSocket Rate Limiter
title: Rate-Limited WebSocket Endpoint
description: Add per-connection rate limiting to a WebSocket handler in FastAPI. Track message counts per client over a sliding window of 10 seconds. Close the connection if the rate limit is exceeded.

name: WebSocket Multiplexer
title: WebSocket Event Type Multiplexer
description: Create a WebSocket server that dispatches different message types using an event multiplexer pattern. Clients send JSON with an 'event' field, and the server routes handling to the correct function.

name: WebSocket Progress Stream
title: Stream Long-Running Task Progress via WebSocket
description: Implement a system where a client submits a long-running task via HTTP and receives real-time progress updates via WebSocket. The server pushes percentage progress until completion.

name: WebSocket Reconnect Logic
title: Client-Side WebSocket Reconnection
description: Implement a robust WebSocket client in JavaScript with exponential backoff reconnection logic. Handle connection errors, server-side disconnects, and network interruptions gracefully.

name: WebSocket Presence Tracker
title: WebSocket User Presence Tracking
description: Build a presence tracking system using WebSockets. Maintain a list of active users per room, broadcast join/leave events, and expose an HTTP endpoint to query current online users.

name: WebSocket Binary Transfer
title: WebSocket Binary File Streaming
description: Implement a WebSocket endpoint that accepts binary data from clients and streams it as chunks to a storage backend. Handle large file transfers with proper buffering and progress reporting.

name: WebSocket Load Test
title: WebSocket Load Test Script
description: Write a Python asyncio script that simulates 100 concurrent WebSocket clients connecting to a server, sending messages at 1-second intervals, and validating broadcast delivery. Report metrics.
